name: Shadows of Taumiel
short_description: First-person horror game that includes several genres such as stealth, platforming and exploration.
detailed_description:
First person horror/adventure game set in a natural environment, the Taumiel Natural Park.
Advance through a semi-wild environment where you will face areas of stealth, platforms and puzzles.

The adventure component is the one that presents more weight in the development, you will have to observe and interpret the environment to be able to advance. All while remaining hidden, giving the stealth component an important weight. During the adventure you will have to interact with different objects or basic mechanisms such as pulleys, counterweights, etc... As well as any object that can be pushed or picked up to help you move forward.

The Taumiel Park, a natural park that includes semi-wilderness and adventure tourism locations, will be the location and one of the main obstacles. The scenery is inspired by (but not 100% copied from) the mountainous regions of northern Spain such as Picos de Europa. They include dreamlike scenes and others out of nightmares, reflecting the fears and inner doubts of the protagonist.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
